title: Grove Extras
description:
Additional content mod for server The Grove, a cobblemon server!
Thanks to Cobblemon Repo for some item textures!
body:
# **What Is Grove Extras?**
This is a mod that adds some items to minecraft. It was created for The Grove, my cobblemon server!

## **What does this mod add?**
- Missing Evo Items (Thank you Cobblemon Repository for Syrupy Apple, Metal Alloy, and Leader's Crest textures <3 )
- Trimmable evolution stone armors (With effects depending on the armor set worn)
-  Diancie Mega Stone
-  Ogerpon Masks
-  Arceus Type Plates
-  Gracidea Flower
-  Griseous Orb
-  Shaderoot Carrot
-  Iceroot Carrot
-  White Stone
-  Black Stone
-  Many other key items
-  Vile Vial, which will be used in the future when we add more cobblemon to The Grove server!
-  A variety of trophies for contests
-  A multitude of evo items/legendary form swap items
-  Plushies! (Please do not put any of this mods plushies behind a paywall)
-  New building blocks, to spice up your worlds
-  Treasure items
- Music Discs

### **Additional Features?**
This mod does not add any special recipes, its all just barebones for the server.
Any items that we can't use as an nbt for the server resourcepack/datapack will be put into this mod for The Grove Server.

This mod is only for Forge for Minecraft 1.20.1 and Fabric for Minecraft 1.21.1

# **Additional terms of use**

Feel free to use this mod! All I ask is that you don't lock any content in it behind a paywall if using on a server! Please credit "Cheeto, BawngWawter, DuskofShades, and CrayolaEater27" if you decide to use this mod for your server or anything, as we worked hard to make these models, and are allowing free use

Any concerns, feel free to contact me on discord
(fwoof)

Thanks

~ Cheeto/Fwoof, Grove Owner
